# TiMOS-B-26.3.R1 both/x86_64 Nokia 7750 SR-1
# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    policy-options {
        policy-statement "export-redist" {
            entry 20 {
                from {
                    protocol {
                        name [static]
                    }
                }
                action {
                    action-type accept
                }
            }
        }
    }
    router "Base" {
        autonomous-system 65001
        interface "system" {
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 1.1.1.1
                    prefix-length 32
                }
            }
        }
        interface "to-r2" {
            port 1/1/c1/1
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 10.0.0.0
                    prefix-length 31
                }
            }
        }
        static-routes {
            route 192.0.2.0/24 route-type unicast {
                next-hop 10.0.0.1 {
                    admin-state enable
                }
            }
        }
        bgp {
            router-id 1.1.1.1
            group "ebgp" {
                peer-as 65002
                export {
                    policy ["export-redist"]
                }
            }
            neighbor "10.0.0.1" {
                group "ebgp"
            }
        }
    }
}
